---
title: "Los Angeles, California"
subtitle: "-"
number: 5
image: /images/skagit-wa.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Skagit County, Washington"
categories: ["Rate Setting", "Service Procurement"]

::: {.article}

# Commercial Franchise Rate Method / Procurement
